title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 137.435 - Real property assessed, how and where
text:
137.435.  Real property assessed, how and where. — All real property shall be assessed in the township in which the same is situated, with the owner's name thereof, if known; if the owner's name is not known, then it shall be assessed as nonresident.  The assessor shall place the street address or rural route and post-office address opposite the name of each taxpayer on the tangible personal property assessment book.
(RSMo 1939 § 14003, A.L. 1981 H.B. 114 & 146) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12326; 1919 § 13239; 1909 § 11727
